footer.text: Character Guide • Synergy: Zibai | Update Date: 02/27/2026 | Editor: ._.samantha._.

fields.name: Notes:
fields.value:
Hydro Options: Yelan, Furina, Mona, Sigewinne, Kokomi, Nilou, Xingqiu. 
*Note some of these characters will require a second Hydro unit to apply enough for Zibai.*

Geo Options: Illuga, Gorou, Zhongli, Chiori, Xilonen.
*Lunar-Crystallize reaction pillars count as Geo Constructs*

Ascendent Gleam Triggers: Jahoda, Ineffa, Illuga, Columbina, Aino.
 *Columbina and C6 Illuga are the premier units, but Ineffa provides enough personal damage to make up for personal DPS losses.*
